mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_consult ( company_name, dept_manager_title, email, phone, quantity, budget, sizes, artwork_types, themes, atmostpheres, install_place, etc_inquiry, password, privacy_agreed, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{companyName}, #{deptManagerTitle}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{quantity}, #{budget}, #{sizes}, #{artworkTypes}, #{themes}, #{atmostpheres}, #{installPlace}, #{etcInquiry}, #{password}, #{privacyAgreed}, '미완료', NOW() )
INSERT INTO biz_consult_file (consult_id, file_path, original_name) VALUES (#{consultId}, #{filePath}, #{originalName})
mapper.select: SELECT id, company_name AS companyName, dept_manager_title AS deptManagerTitle, email, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM biz_consult ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, company_name AS companyName, dept_manager_title AS deptManagerTitle, email, phone, quantity, budget, sizes, artwork_types AS artworkTypes, themes, atmostpheres, install_place AS installPlace, etc_inquiry AS etcInquiry, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM biz_consult WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, password FROM biz_consult WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_consult WHERE status = '미완료'
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_consult SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
